song.title: Conquering Now and Still to Conquer
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Conquering now And still to conquer, Rideth a King in His might, Leading the host of all the faithful Into the midst of the fight;|| See them with courage advancing, Clad in their brilliant array, Shouting the name of their Leader, Hear them exultingly say:
[C] Chorus “Not to the strong is the battle, Not to the swift is the race; Yet to the true and the faithful Vict’ry is promised through grace.”
[V2] 2) Conquering now and still to conquer, Who is this wonderful King? Whence are the armies which He leadeth While of His glory they sing?|| He is our Lord and Redeemer, Savior and Monarch divine; They are the stars that forever Bright in His kingdom will shine.
[V3] 3) Conquering now and still to conquer, Jesus, Thou Ruler of all, Thrones and their scepters all shall perish, Crowns and their splendor shall fall,|| Yet shall the armies Thou leadest Faithful and true to the last, Find in Thy kingdom eternal Rest, when their warfare is past.
song.author: Fanny J. Crosby
